channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 05, 2026
item.description: Global tensions intensify today, as the Middle East witnesses an exchange of attacks between Iran and the United Arab Emirates, while Ukraine and Russia declare rival ceasefires following a drone strike on Moscow. Germany navigates significant US tro...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 04, 2026
item.description: You are listening to The VENCAst. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest headlines and in-depth reports. Today is Monday, May 04, 2026. On today's program, we examine the latest escalation in the conflict in Ukraine, ...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 03, 2026
item.description: This is The VENCAst. A daily briefing on global affairs, European developments, and the world of technology. Today is Sunday, May 03, 2026. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and I am here to bring you the news, objectively and factually...
